name: Jing Char Siu Bau (Steamed BBQ Pork Buns)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine in a bowl: Heat wok for 30 - 40 seconds.
2. Add peanut oil and heat until white smoke rises.
3. Add onions and cook over low heat until they turn light brown.
4. Add char siu, increase heat, and stir fry until the mixture is well combined.
5. Add wine and mix well.
6. Reduce heat and add the sauce mix from the bowl.
7. Stir until thickened.
8. Add 1/2 tsp sesame oil and mix well.
9. Remove the mixture to a shallow dish. Allow it to cool to room temperature, then refrigerate uncovered for 4 hours.
10. Roll one recipe of Steamed Bun Dough into a 16-inch long roll and cut into 16 pieces.
11. Roll each piece into a ball and cover with a damp cloth.
12. Work the dough ball into a hemisphere.
13. Place 2 Tbsp of filling mix into the formed hemisphere in the palm of one hand.
14. Work around the hemisphere, pleating, and closing the dough until the filling is completely covered.
15. Place sealed buns, sealed end down, on 2.5" X 2.5" squares of wax paper.
16. Place them in a steamer at least 2 inches apart.
17. Steam for 15 - 20 minutes.
18. Serve immediately.
